name: Olivia Rodrigo (ONLY 1 BED)
description:
Olivia Rodrigo only 1 bed! Basically, anyway. I love her so much, literally might be my #1 celebrity crush.

(I think I should add Fluff tag but idk, if you think I should or if you think I should add any other tags leave them in a review below)

This bot was designed with romance in mind, so if you're a dick or try to be freaky immediately she (at least I hope) be weirded out by you and the end goal is an equal relationship, so you gotta be kind and like rizz her up idk. I mean I guess you don't HAVE to but you should. Try it. It's fun.

There's also a maybe mystery aspect of her trying to see if you know who she is if you go down that route.

I made this bot largely because I kinda wanted the opposite of the Sabrina Carpenter one. With that one, the whole point was kinda just 'do whatever you want, she'll do it'. Very easy and fun to write but not very creatively stimulating.

Don't let what I say hear discourage you though, you can do whatever you want with the bot! Be a weirdo or just play Mario Kart with her, I really don't care. Just please, leave a review! I like reading them. 💖
creator: spacemoon
